description: Official Zorka Design System — dark-first, strong typography, Zorka red as the single brand accent.
brandPrinciples: Dark-first: main background is color.surface.dark (#0E1016) with light text; cards use color.surface.dark2 (#161A22) with a subtle 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.12) border.

One accent only: Zorka red (color.primary.red) is the single brand accent — used for CTAs, highlighted words, the kicker dot and thick underlines. Green/blue/yellow are functional (success/info/warning), never decorative.
Strong typography: headings weight 700–800 with tight negative letter-spacing; kickers/eyebrows uppercase with 0.28em letter-spacing preceded by a small red dot.
Signature details: subtle background grid texture (1px lines, rgba(255,255,255,0.05), 72px cells on dark), pill chips with thin borders, screenshots framed with radius 2xl + deep 'hero' shadow.
Avoid pure black (#000000) in large areas; avoid gradients as the main visual language — Zorka is flat, high-contrast and typographic.
